result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 5:     AND createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 month...
                            ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT id, createddate, closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS assign_time,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assign_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%%'
), initial_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, new_owner AS ownerid
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
), handled_cases AS (
  -- only cases NOT transferred (exactly one owner assignment)
  SELECT rc.id AS case_id, io.ownerid, rc.createddate, rc.closeddate
  FROM recent_cases rc
  JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = rc.id AND oa.assign_cnt = 1
  JOIN initial_owner io ON io.case_id = rc.id
), handle_time_by_owner AS (
  SELECT ownerid, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS handled_case_count
  FROM handled_cases
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
), managed_cases AS (
  -- cases where the agent appears in any owner assignment (initial or subsequent)
  SELECT DISTINCT oa.case_id, oa.new_owner AS ownerid
  FROM owner_assignments oa
  JOIN recent_cases rc ON rc.id = oa.case_id
), managed_counts AS (
  SELECT ownerid, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS managed_case_count
  FROM managed_cases
  GROUP BY ownerid
)
SELECT h.ownerid
FROM handle_time_by_owner h
JOIN managed_counts m ON m.ownerid = h.ownerid
ORDER BY h.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT id, createddate, closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS assign_time,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assign_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
), initial_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, new_owner AS ownerid
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
), handled_cases AS (
  -- only cases NOT transferred (exactly one owner assignment)
  SELECT rc.id AS case_id, io.ownerid, rc.createddate, rc.closeddate
  FROM recent_cases rc
  JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = rc.id AND oa.assign_cnt = 1
  JOIN initial_owner io ON io.case_id = rc.id
), handle_time_by_owner AS (
  SELECT ownerid, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS handled_case_count
  FROM handled_cases
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
), managed_cases AS (
  -- cases where the agent appears in any owner assignment (initial or subsequent)
  SELECT DISTINCT oa.case_id, oa.new_owner AS ownerid
  FROM owner_assignments oa
  JOIN recent_cases rc ON rc.id = oa.case_id
), managed_counts AS (
  SELECT ownerid, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS managed_case_count
  FROM managed_cases
  GROUP BY ownerid
)
SELECT h.ownerid
FROM handle_time_by_owner h
JOIN managed_counts m ON m.ownerid = h.ownerid
ORDER BY h.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT id, createddate, closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS assign_time,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assign_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
), initial_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, new_owner AS ownerid
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
), handled_cases AS (
  -- only cases NOT transferred (exactly one owner assignment)
  SELECT rc.id AS case_id, io.ownerid, rc.createddate, rc.closeddate
  FROM recent_cases rc
  JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = rc.id AND oa.assign_cnt = 1
  JOIN initial_owner io ON io.case_id = rc.id
), handle_time_by_owner AS (
  SELECT ownerid, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS handled_case_count
  FROM handled_cases
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
), managed_cases AS (
  -- cases where the agent appears in any owner assignment (initial or subsequent)
  SELECT DISTINCT oa.case_id, oa.new_owner AS ownerid
  FROM owner_assignments oa
  JOIN recent_cases rc ON rc.id = oa.case_id
), managed_counts AS (
  SELECT ownerid, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS managed_case_count
  FROM managed_cases
  GROUP BY ownerid
)
SELECT h.ownerid
FROM handle_time_by_owner h
JOIN managed_counts m ON m.ownerid = h.ownerid
ORDER BY h.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT id,
         createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS assign_time,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate::timestamp) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assign_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
), initial_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, new_owner AS ownerid
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
), handled_cases AS (
  SELECT rc.id AS case_id, io.ownerid, rc.created_ts, rc.closed_ts
  FROM recent_cases rc
  JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = rc.id AND oa.assign_cnt = 1
  JOIN initial_owner io ON io.case_id = rc.id
), handle_time_by_owner AS (
  SELECT ownerid,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS handled_case_count
  FROM handled_cases
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT ownerid
FROM handle_time_by_owner
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT id,
         createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS assign_time,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate::timestamp) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assign_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
), initial_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, new_owner AS ownerid
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
), handled_cases AS (
  SELECT rc.id AS case_id, io.ownerid, rc.created_ts, rc.closed_ts
  FROM recent_cases rc
  JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = rc.id AND oa.assign_cnt = 1
  JOIN initial_owner io ON io.case_id = rc.id
), handle_time_by_owner AS (
  SELECT ownerid,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS handled_case_count
  FROM handled_cases
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT ownerid
FROM handle_time_by_owner
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT id,
         createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS assign_time,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate::timestamp) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assign_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
), initial_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, new_owner AS ownerid
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
), handled_cases AS (
  SELECT rc.id AS case_id, io.ownerid, rc.created_ts, rc.closed_ts
  FROM recent_cases rc
  JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = rc.id AND oa.assign_cnt = 1
  JOIN initial_owner io ON io.case_id = rc.id
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS handled_cases,
       COUNT(DISTINCT ownerid) AS owners,
       MIN(created_ts) AS min_created,
       MAX(created_ts) AS max_created
FROM handled_cases;

args.query:
WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT id,
         createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS assign_time,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate::timestamp) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assign_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
), initial_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, new_owner AS ownerid
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
), handled_cases AS (
  SELECT rc.id AS case_id, io.ownerid, rc.created_ts, rc.closed_ts
  FROM recent_cases rc
  JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = rc.id AND oa.assign_cnt = 1
  JOIN initial_owner io ON io.case_id = rc.id
)
SELECT ownerid, COUNT(*) AS handled_case_count
FROM handled_cases
GROUP BY ownerid
ORDER BY handled_case_count DESC, ownerid
LIMIT 10;

LIMIT 10;

result.preview: "No agent qualifies (no agent handled more than one non-transferred case in the past four months), so there is no agent Id to return."

args.answer: No agent qualifies (no agent handled more than one non-transferred case in the past four months), so there is no agent Id to return.

val_args.answer: No agent qualifies (no agent handled more than one non-transferred case in the past four months), so there is no agent Id to return.
